title: Etsy Leadership Transition: Kruti Patel Goyal Named CEO
text: Etsy announced a leadership transition in December 2025. Kruti Patel Goyal assumed the CEO role in January 2026, replacing Josh Silverman, who transitioned to Executive Chair. Silverman has been supporting Goyal as Executive Chair through 2026. Goyal brings fresh perspective to Etsy's strategic initiatives, including the company's focus on AI-driven growth, marketplace personalization, and operational improvements. The leadership transition comes at a critical time for Etsy, as the company focuses on returning to gross merchandise sales growth and improving profitability. Under new leadership, Etsy continues to invest in agentic commerce partnerships with OpenAI, Google, and Microsoft to drive discovery and high-intent buyer traffic. The company also maintains its commitment to divestment of non-core assets like Depop and Reverb, allowing Etsy to concentrate resources on core marketplace growth.
